scorza23: posts the ante 10
TheXimbica: posts small blind 25
Leyzem: posts big blind 50

scorza23: raises 100 to 150
Othon69: folds 
TheXimbica: calls 125
Leyzem: folds

TheXimbica: bets 340 and is all-in
scorza23: folds

TheXimbica collected 390 from pot

Seat 4: scorza23 folded on the Flop

scorza23: posts big blind 50

Seat 1: Othon69 (1080 in chips)

Seat 3: Leyzem (190 in chips) 
Seat 4: scorza23 (85 in chips) 
Othon69: posts the ante 20
TheXimbica: posts the ante 20
Leyzem: posts the ante 20
scorza23: posts the ante 20
Othon69: posts small blind 50
TheXimbica: posts big blind 100
*** HOLE CARDS ***

scorza23: folds 
Othon69: folds 
TheXimbica: calls 70

*** TURN *** [4c Ah Kh] [5s]

PokerStars Hand #259762505034: Tournament #3975949849, $0.29+$0.01 USD Hold'em No Limit - Match Round I, Level II (50/100) - 2026/02/17 14:17:50 UTC [2026/02/17 9:17:50 ET]
Table '3975949849 3' 4-max Seat #1 is the button
Seat 1: Othon69 (1010 in chips) 
Seat 2: TheXimbica (455 in chips) 
Seat 3: Leyzem (470 in chips) 
Seat 4: scorza23 (65 in chips) 
Othon69: posts the ante 20
TheXimbica: posts the ante 20
Leyzem: posts the ante 20
scorza23: posts the ante 20
TheXimbica: posts small blind 50
Leyzem: posts big blind 100
*** HOLE CARDS ***
Dealt to scorza23 [Qd 4s]
scorza23: calls 45 and is all-in
Othon69: folds 
TheXimbica: folds 
Uncalled bet (50) returned to Leyzem
*** FLOP *** [9d 6d 6h]
*** TURN *** [9d 6d 6h] [Ac]
*** RIVER *** [9d 6d 6h Ac] [Kd]
*** SHOW DOWN ***
Leyzem: shows [Td 9h] (two pair, Nines and Sixes)
Leyzem collected 10 from side pot
scorza23: shows [Qd 4s] (a pair of Sixes)
Leyzem collected 215 from main pot
scorza23 finished the tournament in 10th place
*** SUMMARY ***
Total pot 225 Main pot 215. Side pot 10. | Rake 0 
Board [9d 6d 6h Ac Kd]
Seat 1: Othon69 (button) folded before Flop (didn't bet)
Seat 2: TheXimbica (small blind) folded before Flop
Seat 3: Leyzem (big blind) showed [Td 9h] and won (225) with two pair, Nines and Sixes
Seat 4: scorza23 showed [Qd 4s] and lost with a pair of Sixes
